subcodes.first_line: O sapling of the garden of supreme martyrdom! News of thy father's martyrdom hath caused boundless sorrow and grief [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهال بوستان شهادت کبری خبر شهادت حضرت پدر سبب حسرت و اسف و احزان بیحد و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @martyrs and martyrdom, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
